description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Test 'pip' Package that runs on every push to dev and main branches and on pull requests to these branches. The workflow uses a concurrency group and cancels in-progress jobs. It consists of two jobs: a cache job that sets up Python 3.12, installs ISOFIT, and caches extras, and a test job that runs in a matrix of Python versions 3.8-3.12, installs ISOFIT and dependencies, and executes tests with Pytest.
